query: US spot Bitcoin ETF net flows late June 2026 and early July 2026, weekly trend from Farside Investors and SoSoValue. Are net outflows continuing into the week of June 29-July 3 2026? What is the Bitcoin price trend in late June 2026?
answer:
Research complete. Key findings on US spot Bitcoin ETF net flows and Bitcoin price for late June/early July 2026:

**ETF Flows — outflows continued into June 29–July 3 week:**
- Week netted **~-$526 million** (the eighth consecutive negative week, longest streak since Jan 2024 launch)
- Daily: Jun 29 -$231M, Jun 30 -$223M, Jul 1 -$296M, then Jul 2 **+$223.5M reversal** (led by FBTC +$166M, ARKB +$92M)
- IBIT drove losses (-$300M on Jun 29 alone; ~73% of June's withdrawals)
- **June 2026 = ~$4.06B total outflows, the worst month on record** (SoSoValue), part of ~$7.2B drained across record May/June daily streaks

**Bitcoin Price — sharply down in late June, modest early-July recovery:**
- Fell from ~$66,290 (Jun 15) to a period low of **$58,559 on June 30**, amid "Extreme Fear" (F&G index 24)
- Recovered to low-to-mid $60Ks in early July (~$62,544 on Jul 3; ~$64,200 by Jul 10–11)
- Trailing 3-month return: **-12.1%**

Data cross-validated across Farside/SoSoValue-cited reporting (KuCoin, incrypted, crypto.news, DailyCoin, CoinDesk) plus Yahoo Finance price data. Minor source discrepancies noted (-$526.1M vs -$526.64M weekly; $4.06B vs $4.5B for June).
